form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished last on April 13 over 365m at this track behind Market Maverick beaten 12 lengths (21.46) in a Grade 5. Has been racing well. Well placed here and looks a leading contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost momentum in the home turn and throughout the home straight.

form.formComment: Effortless winner to score by 13 lengths in a Maiden last start at this track, clocking a brilliant 20.50 for the 365m trip. Top win and looms as a strong winning chance.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 365m in 20.88. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when eighth over 520m at this track at Mix level. Major threat on best form.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a quick early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (21.02) over 365m at this track. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.
